_meta.description: PRE-FIX PRS demo state — REAL pre-fix diagnosis. Composite is computed from the 6 in-scope Engagement-measured dimensions: 3 existing (AutoSegment coverage, Signal Freshness, A/B Coverage — MCP-harvested) plus 3 new Engagement-measured dimensions (Segment Definition Quality, Profile Completeness, Behavioral Signal Richness — also MCP-harvested from the wobbly-donkey Engagement project). BRUID match rate and Rule Conflicts are Discovery dimensions that are OUT OF SCOPE — Discovery is not enabled for this hackathon sandbox (infrastructure scope, 90-day roadmap). They are excluded from the composite so their placeholder values cannot inflate or contradict the score.
_meta.source: loomi-snapshot.json — 6 Engagement MCP dims (3 existing + 3 new). BRUID + Rule Conflicts are out of scope (Discovery not enabled) and excluded.
_meta.scoring: Per dimension: score = min(20, round(raw_value × 20)); status 0–8 critical, 9–14 warning, 15–20 healthy. Composite = round(sum of in-scope dims / (20 × count of in-scope dims) × 100); out-of-scope (Discovery) dims excluded. RAG: red <50, amber 50–74, green 75+.

score_verification.in_scope_dims: autosegment 0 + signal_freshness 2 + ab_test_coverage 0 + segment_definition_quality 3 + profile_completeness 4 + behavioral_signal_richness 8 = 17 of 120 available points (6 Engagement MCP dimensions)
score_verification.excluded_out_of_scope: bruid_match_rate (8/20) and rule_conflicts (18/20) are Discovery dimensions, out of scope (Discovery not enabled for this sandbox), and are NOT counted.
